title: Gomesa salesopolitana
taxonomy: Gomesa salesopolitana belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid is a member of the genus Gomesa, which is a group of orchids that are native to the tropical regions of South America. Gomesa salesopolitana is further classified as part of the subtribe Oncidiinae, which includes various species of orchids. The classification of Gomesa salesopolitana is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Subfamily: Orchidoideae, Tribe: Cymbidieae, Subtribe: Oncidiinae. Gomesa salesopolitana is also known as a terrestrial orchid.
